summary: Iter5 testing of Brogliaccio Prima Nota changes - all 6 changes verified successfully (rename column header to Descrizione, add Conto/Banca dropdown in Nuovo movimento, removal of free-text mezzo_pagamento, rename Librerie tab to Metodo di Pagamento, removal of 7 KPI cards from brogliaccio page, idempotent seed migration RID->Pagamento Direzione + PayPal deactivated).

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility a11y warning, not critical

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to NuovoMovimentoDialog to silence Radix UI a11y console warnings
critical_code_review_comments: seed_admin migration is idempotent and runs on every startup as required (server.py:6414-6419) - good.
Brogliaccio response includes conti_cassa list and excludes inactive ones via /api/librerie/conti-cassa?attivi=true - PayPal correctly filtered out.
Movimento POST persists both conto_cassa_id and mezzo_pagamento for backward-compat as designed.
seed_data_creation: Test movement created with date 2026-01-15 and cleaned up after assertions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter5_brogliaccio.py validates: (1) seed migration (RID Direzione renamed, PayPal deactivated, Pagamento Direzione present), (2) movimento creation with conto_cassa_id+mezzo_pagamento persisted, (3) brogliaccio per-day endpoint returns the movement with conto_cassa fields and conti_cassa list excludes PayPal. Brogliaccio uses query param `data=YYYY-MM-DD`, NOT dal/al. Playwright verified: 'Descrizione' header, KPI cards removed (0 brog-kpi testids), mov-conto-select dropdown present, free-text mezzo input removed, validation toast 'Seleziona il metodo di pagamento (Conto / Banca)' working, Librerie tab label='Metodo di Pagamento'.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found, all requested changes verified working.
